product_overview: AzAgroPOS is a modern POS system for agricultural and retail businesses, providing centralized management for sales, inventory, and user access. The platform emphasizes secure authentication, fast product lookup, and streamlined transaction handling.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication for system access
Enable efficient sales creation and transaction processing
Offer reliable product listing and inventory visibility
Support role-based operational workflows in a POS environment

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows staff to log in securely and receive an authenticated session for protected operations.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid username and password -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> Use token for subsequent protected API calls
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> No token issued

features.name: Sales Management
features.description: Enables authenticated users to create new sales transactions using itemized cart data.
user_flows: POST /api/sales with valid items array and authenticated token -> Receive 200 with SaleResponse confirming the sale
POST /api/sales without authentication token -> Receive authorization failure from the protected endpoint
POST /api/sales with malformed or empty items array and authenticated token -> Receive validation error response

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Lets authenticated users retrieve the current product catalog for browsing and inventory reference.
user_flows: GET /api/products with valid authentication token -> Receive 200 with Product[] list -> Display products to the user
GET /api/products without authentication token -> Receive authorization failure from the protected endpoint
GET /api/products with expired or invalid token -> Receive authentication/authorization error response
